phase3_findings.description: Park-calibration gate re-grade: the backstop's remaining documented residual (remove the tag from one row while adding it to another nets to zero under an aggregate count) is a working laundering path, not an out-of-flow curiosity. Reproduced: a 3-pair call ships `AC one (post-merge)` with no note, exit 0, PATCHed. It also falsifies SKILL.md/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW's 'crafted multi-pair sequence ... is caught' claim a second way.

step_3_5_gate.result: FOUND: Important — the length-mismatch fallback re-opened the net-zero laundering because a newline in NEW splits a row. Plus a Suggestion: docstring/changeset over-claimed. Routed back into the same iteration (inner re-fix attempt 1).
